cases.title: TS-04: Unauthenticated POST /api/v1/check-in returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active session exists with valid QR token for check-in payload
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude, and longitude and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response body contains outcome Unauthenticated and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query attendance records for the session and submitting student context
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with errorCode Unauthenticated and Vietnamese message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục; no attendance record created or updated; CheckInAttempt may log Unauthenticated outcome per API design §6.3

cases.title: TS-05: Login with returnUrl preserves check-in deep link and establishes session
preconditions: Active student account exists with valid credentials
Check-in deep link path is /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with student email, password, and returnUrl /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
Assert HTTP status 200 and response includes redirectTo matching returnUrl
Assert Set-Cookie header sets wecheck_session HttpOnly cookie
GET /api/v1/auth/me using the issued session cookie
cases.expected: Login returns 200 with user profile, session object (id, expiresAt), and redirectTo /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>; session cookie issued; /api/v1/auth/me returns authenticated student identity

cases.title: TS-06: Session idle beyond 8 hours rejects check-in with SessionExpired
preconditions: Student has AuthSession row with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before fixed test clock
TestClock is injected and set to current time
Active session with valid QR token exists
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session cookie or bearer token and valid check-in payload
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response errorCode SessionExpired
Attempt GET /api/v1/auth/me with the same expired session
cases.expected: Check-in returns HTTP 401 with errorCode SessionExpired and Vietnamese message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn; check-in does not succeed; /api/v1/auth/me also returns 401

cases.title: AuthService.authenticate persists AuthSession and enforces 8-hour sliding expiry in Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
identity-auth AuthService is wired to AuthSession repository
Active student user exists with known credentials
steps: Invoke AuthService.authenticate with valid student credentials
Query auth_sessions table for new row with userId, expiresAt, and lastActivityAt
Advance TestClock by 8 hours and 1 minute without activity
Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) with the session id
cases.expected: AuthSession row committed on successful login with expiresAt reflecting 8-hour sliding window; requireUser throws or returns invalid after 8+ hours inactivity per FR-02 default

cases.title: AuthSession transitions from valid to expired after inactivity threshold
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with lastActivityAt at T0
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Verify AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) succeeds at T0 + 7h 59m
Advance clock to T0 + 8h 1m without updating lastActivityAt
Call AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) again
Query auth_sessions row for revocation or expiry flag
cases.expected: Session is valid before 8-hour inactivity boundary; after boundary requireUser fails with session-expired semantics and session is no longer usable for protected actions

cases.title: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with user, session, and optional redirectTo envelope
preconditions: Active student account exists
Request body includes email, password, and returnUrl per API design §2.2
steps: Send POST /api/v1/auth/login with Content-Type application/json and valid credentials plus returnUrl
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains user (id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role), session (id, expiresAt), and redirectTo
Assert Set-Cookie wecheck_session is present with HttpOnly attribute
cases.expected: HTTP 200 OK with documented login success envelope; session cookie issued; redirectTo echoes relative returnUrl path

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in without credentials returns 401 with Unauthenticated error envelope
preconditions: API server is running
Valid check-in request body prepared per API design §6.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in without Cookie and without Authorization header
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response JSON contains errorCode Unauthenticated and Vietnamese message field
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope: errorCode Unauthenticated, message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục, requestId present

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /api/v1/check-in without checkin:submit permission
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is established
Instructor lacks checkin:submit permission per roles matrix §2.1
Active session with valid QR token exists
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden with localized permission-denied message; no attendance status updated to Present for instructor identity

cases.title: Invalid credentials on POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 401 InvalidCredentials
preconditions: Student account exists with known email
No valid session is established
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with correct email and wrong password
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode InvalidCredentials
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
POST /api/v1/check-in without session to confirm still Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Login returns HTTP 401 InvalidCredentials with localized error; no session cookie issued; subsequent check-in remains blocked with 401 Unauthenticated

cases.title: GET /api/v1/auth/me without session returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or bearer token present
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me without authentication headers
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with errorCode Unauthenticated; no user profile returned

cases.title: AC-02a: Unauthenticated check-in deep link redirects to login preserving returnUrl
preconditions: User is not logged in (no wecheck_session cookie)
Mobile browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id> from scanned QR deep link
steps: Open /check-in?token=<token-id> in mobile viewport
Observe browser URL changes to /login with returnUrl query parameter encoding the check-in path
Verify check-in page content is not shown and no success confirmation appears
cases.expected: Browser redirects to /login?returnUrl=%2Fcheck-in%3Ftoken%3D<token-id> (or equivalent encoded path); no attendance action occurs; login form is displayed

cases.title: AC-02b: Successful login after redirect returns student to check-in flow
preconditions: Student landed on login page with returnUrl pointing to /check-in?token=<token-id>
Student has valid active account credentials
steps: Enter valid email and password on LoginForm
Submit login
Observe post-login navigation URL and page content
Verify authenticated check-in scan step loads with token context preserved
cases.expected: After successful login browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id>; session established; scan step renders with token context; GPS capture step does not mount until authenticated GET preflight returns 200 per FR-07 and BR-15

cases.title: AC-02c: Expired session on check-in page shows toast and redirects to login
preconditions: Student session cookie exists but server treats session as expired (lastActivityAt > 8h ago via TestClock)
Student is on /check-in page with valid token context
steps: Trigger check-in preflight or submit action on expired session
Observe toast or alert with message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in path
Confirm GpsCaptureStep does not mount after preflight failure
cases.expected: UI displays session-expired toast per ui-states §401 handling; GET preflight or submit returns SessionExpired; user redirected to login with returnUrl; check-in does not complete until re-authentication per AC-02c and BR-15

cases.title: Deactivated user existing session invalidated before check-in middleware runs
preconditions: Student user exists with active=false
Stale AuthSession row still present for that userId from prior activation
Auth middleware and identity-auth module integrated with real DB
steps: Invoke auth middleware with stale session cookie for deactivated user
Assert middleware rejects request before check-in handler executes
Query attendance table to confirm no Present record created
cases.expected: Middleware returns 401 Unauthenticated or SessionExpired semantics; deactivated user cannot check in even with leftover session row per BR-06 and roles §1.4

cases.title: AC-02d: UserMenu Đăng xuất from Student, Instructor, and Admin shells lands on /login without returnUrl
preconditions: Test accounts exist for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin roles
Each role shell renders UserMenu with data-testid user-menu-trigger in header
steps: Log in as Student; open UserMenu via user-menu-trigger; click user-menu-logout labeled Đăng xuất
Assert browser navigates to /login with no returnUrl query parameter; GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401
Log in as Instructor; repeat UserMenu logout flow on instructor shell
Assert lands on /login without returnUrl; session cookie cleared
Log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin; repeat UserMenu logout flow on admin shell
Assert lands on /login without returnUrl; navigate to protected /admin route and observe redirect to /login with returnUrl
cases.expected: Each role shell logout via UserMenu triggers POST /auth/logout 204 with credentials include, clears wecheck_session cookie, and redirects to /login without returnUrl per AC-02d and user flows §14; protected route access after logout redirects to login with returnUrl per BR-06

cases.title: AC-02e: UserMenu identity panel shows displayName, email, institutionalId, and localized role
preconditions: Authenticated student logged in with known displayName, email, and institutionalId from seed data
GET /api/v1/auth/me returns matching profile for the session
steps: Open UserMenu via data-testid user-menu-trigger on authenticated shell
Verify dropdown panel shows displayName as primary semibold text
Verify panel shows email as secondary truncated text with title attribute for full value
Verify panel shows institutionalId prefixed with Mã:
Verify panel shows localized role label Sinh viên from roleLabels[Student]
cases.expected: UserMenu read-only identity header displays displayName, email, institutionalId, and localized role label sourced from /auth/me per AC-02e, 05-common-ui-components §6.3, and user flows §14 step 2

cases.title: AC-02d: POST /api/v1/auth/logout returns 204 and revokes session cookie
preconditions: Authenticated student session is established with valid wecheck_session cookie
auth_sessions row exists for the session id
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/logout with valid session cookie and credentials include
Assert HTTP status 204 No Content
Assert Set-Cookie header clears or expires wecheck_session cookie
GET /api/v1/auth/me with the same session cookie
Query auth_sessions table for revoked_at on the session row
cases.expected: HTTP 204 on logout per API design §2.3; session cookie cleared; subsequent GET /auth/me returns 401 Unauthenticated; auth_sessions row revoked per AC-02d

cases.title: AC-02a: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight without session returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active workshop session exists with valid unexpired QR token
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/<valid-token-id>/preflight without auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response does not include session summary or enrollment pass payload
cases.expected: Preflight requires authenticated session per FR-07 and BR-06; unauthenticated request blocked with HTTP 401 Unauthenticated and message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục; client must not advance to GPS step per BR-15
